goal: Install standalone WatchTower repo on INTEL, verify service stability, broadcast presence, and non-destructive rescue smoke readiness from HASHI1.

requires: route and file transfer preflight green
package manifest includes sha256 and byte sizes
existing Intel WatchTower removed or upgraded only with rollback
WatchTower appears from HASHI1 over LAN as Intel-WT
Intel-WT is distinguishable from local WATCHTOWER
authenticated non-destructive rescue smoke passes against Intel-WT
INTEL HASHI core is not shut down during smoke

risks: C:\Users\Print\projects does not exist yet and must be created for standalone WatchTower install
Windows service install may require elevated rights
NSSM acquisition may require winget or outbound download on Intel
service install writes firewall rule and scheduled health task
hchat protocol transport times out but cached Workbench API delivery succeeds
